svg.title: HLD interview mindset — how to approach the conversation
svg.desc: The correct order of operations in an HLD interview: clarify, propose scope, align, then design. Also shows junior vs senior problem framing.
svg.text: The right order in an HLD interview

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What clarifying questions should I ask at the start of a system design interview?')
sendPrompt('How do I propose scope in a system design interview?')
sendPrompt('How do I align with the interviewer before starting the design?')
sendPrompt('What does a good HLD design execution look like?')
sendPrompt('What does a junior-level system design question look like?')
sendPrompt('What does a senior-level system design question look like?')
g.text: Asking good questions IS the answer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are common mistakes people make in HLD interviews?')
sendPrompt('Why is HLD not about coding?')
sendPrompt('What should I show in HLD instead of implementation details?')

svg.text: click any box to explore further
